task_completion.description: Verify the workflow is created for the Potentials module with the correct name.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a workflow creation or summary screen showing the Target Module as 'Potentials' (or Opportunities, depending on Vtiger version) and the Description/Summary as 'Auto-Update Next Step on Closed Won'.

task_completion.description: Verify the workflow is set to trigger every time a record is saved.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the workflow trigger settings (usually a radio button or dropdown) selected as 'Every time the record is saved' or a visually equivalent option in the Vtiger UI.

task_completion.description: Verify the workflow condition checks if the Sales Stage is Closed Won.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a condition block in the workflow setup showing the field 'Sales Stage' (or sales_stage), an operator like 'is' or 'equals', and the value 'Closed Won'.

task_completion.description: Verify an 'Update Fields' action is added with the correct title.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for an action added to the workflow with the Action Type 'Update Fields' and the Action Title 'Set Next Step to Generate Invoice'.

task_completion.description: Verify the action correctly sets the Next Step field to Generate Invoice.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look inside the 'Update Fields' action configuration screen. The field 'Next Step' (or nextstep) should be selected and mapped to the text value 'Generate Invoice'.

task_completion.description: Verify the workflow is saved and marked as active.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a status toggle or checkbox indicating the workflow is 'Active', and evidence that the workflow has been saved (e.g., a success message, or viewing it in the list of existing workflows).

integrity.description: Verify the agent used the Vtiger CRM web interface.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show a web browser navigating the Vtiger CRM interface, not terminal windows executing curl commands or API scripts.

integrity.description: Verify the agent did not bypass the UI by directly editing the database.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should not show database management tools like phpMyAdmin, MySQL CLI, or raw SQL queries being executed.

integrity.description: Verify the agent actually went through the workflow creation steps.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show intermediate steps of the CRM settings, such as the workflow list, condition builder, and action configuration popups, rather than just a final static page.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Target Module: 'Potentials'. Workflow Name/Summary: 'Auto-Update Next Step on Closed Won'. Condition Field: 'Sales Stage' (internal: sales_stage). Condition Value: 'Closed Won'. Action Type: 'Update Fields' (internal: UpdateFields). Action Update Field: 'Next Step' (internal: nextstep). Action Update Value: 'Generate Invoice'.
